class.name: CSVChunkProcessor
class.description: CSVChunkProcessor provides helpers for processing large CSV files in bounded chunks, sampling rows, counting rows, splitting files, and merging files. When no dialect is provided, the default CSV dialect is used.

method.name: count_rows
method.description: Counts rows in [param path] using [param dialect]. Returns [code]-1[/code] on error.

method.name: merge_files
method.description: Merges [param paths] into [param output_path] using [param dialect]. If [param include_headers] is [code]true[/code] and the dialect has headers, one header row is written to the output.

method.name: process_file
method.description: Reads [param path] in chunks of [param chunk_size] rows and calls [param callable] with [code](chunk, chunk_index)[/code].

method.name: sample_file
method.description: Returns up to [param count] rows from the start of [param path] using [param dialect].

method.name: split_file
method.description: Splits [param path] into files in [param output_dir], writing up to [param rows_per_file] rows per output file.
